function.name: schedule_next_session
function.description: Schedule the next session of the three-session study with the participant. Use only at the end of the current session.

suggestedTime.description: Natural language time for the next session, e.g. 'in three days at this same time', 'next Tuesday at 2pm', or whatever the participant proposes.

messages.content: Got it. I'll call you {{suggestedTime}} for our next conversation. Well, that wraps up today's interview session. Thank you so much for everything you've shared today. Take care until then.
